# A7 Docs

> Agent-ready documentation entry point for the A7 compiler and language.

A7 is a statically typed systems language compiler implemented in Python. It compiles A7 source to Zig, rejects source recursion, and verifies examples through compile/build/run/output gates.

## Introduction

- [Docs Index](/a7-py/docs/index.md): Full curl.md navigation tree and fetch order.
- [Full Context](/a7-py/llms-full.txt): Single-file aggregate for large-context ingestion.
- [Getting Started](/a7-py/docs/getting-started.md): Install, compile, run, and test A7.
- [Installation](/a7-py/docs/install.md): Toolchain and local docs setup.
- [Why A7](/a7-py/docs/why.md): Project goals, non-goals, and fit.
- [FAQ](/a7-py/docs/faq.md): Short answers for agent workflows.

## Guide

- [Features](/a7-py/docs/guide/features.md): Implemented language, compiler, and verification capabilities.
- [Agent Usage](/a7-py/docs/guide/agent-usage.md): Fetch order, verification commands, and trust boundaries.
- [CLI](/a7-py/docs/guide/cli.md): Compiler modes, flags, exit codes, and automation commands.
- [API and SDK](/a7-py/docs/guide/api.md): Automation entry points and current limits.
- [Plugins](/a7-py/docs/guide/plugins.md): Agent and editor integration map.

## Plugins

- [Amp](/a7-py/docs/plugins/amp.md): Use A7 docs from Amp.
- [Claude Code](/a7-py/docs/plugins/claude.md): Use A7 docs from Claude Code.
- [Codex](/a7-py/docs/plugins/codex.md): Use A7 docs from Codex.
- [Cursor](/a7-py/docs/plugins/cursor.md): Use A7 docs from Cursor.
- [OpenCode](/a7-py/docs/plugins/opencode.md): Use A7 docs from OpenCode.
- [Pi](/a7-py/docs/plugins/pi.md): Use A7 docs from Pi.

## LLM Resources

- [Skills](/a7-py/docs/skills.md): Agent skill guidance and repo rules.

## Contributing

- [Contributing](/a7-py/docs/dev/develop.md): Local development workflow.
- [Deploy](/a7-py/docs/dev/deploy.md): Docs deploy and release notes.
- [Kitchen Sink](/a7-py/docs/dev/kitchen-sink.md): Markdown component coverage.
- [Changelog](/a7-py/docs/changelog.md): Current release notes and notable changes.

## A7 References

- [Language and Library](/a7-py/docs/language.md): Syntax, type guidance, stdlib, and recursion rule.
- [Compiler and Tests](/a7-py/docs/compiler.md): Pipeline, Zig backend, example verifier, and release gate.
- [Examples](/a7-py/docs/examples.md): Example catalog, including `037_language_tour.a7`, and verification commands.
- [Release](/a7-py/docs/release.md): Debug/release artifacts, package build, audits, and draft GitHub release artifacts.
- [Status](/a7-py/docs/status.md): Current implementation status and known gaps.
- [Pipeline](/a7-py/docs/pipeline.md): Alias for compiler pipeline notes.
- [Testing](/a7-py/docs/testing.md): Alias for verification commands.
- [Standard Library](/a7-py/docs/stdlib.md): Alias for current stdlib surface.

## Human Site

- [A7 Docs App](/a7-py/): Interactive docs site.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/code5717/a7-py): Source, tests, examples, and release workflows.
